name: severity resolver: numeric 2 and string "error" produce identical behavior and output
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/cli.sh" --rule no-eval --severity 2 --in "$PWD/file.js" --report-format json 2>num.json; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/cli.sh" --rule no-eval --severity error --in "$PWD/file.js" --report-format json 2>str.json; diff num.json str.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
